name: Transcode Therapeutics, Inc.
business: TransCode is a clinical-stage company pioneering immuno-oncology and RNA therapeutics for treatment of high risk and advanced cancers. Its lead therapeutic candidate is TTX-MC138, an antisense inhibitor of an oncogenic microRNA, and it also develops a cancer vaccine, Seviprotimut-L, and an oncolytic immunotherapy platform.
sellsTo: patients with stage IIB and IIC melanoma

exposures.sentence: TransCode is a clinical-stage company pioneering immuno-oncology and RNA therapeutics for treatment of high risk and advanced cancers.

catalysts.event: Start of Phase 2a clinical trial for TTX-MC138 as part of PRE-I-SPY
catalysts.sentence: This trial is planned to begin in the second quarter 2026

tamClaims.claim: The metastatic cancer treatment market size was $83.85 billion in 2023 and is expected to reach $137.31 billion in 2030, representing a CAGR of 7.3%.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Maximize March Research, the metastatic cancer treatment market size was $83.85 billion in 2023. This market is expected to reach $137.31 billion in 2030, representing a compounded annual growth rate of 7.3% over that period.
